refund_policy.policy_text: Customer satisfaction priority. If not completely satisfied or experiencing issues, contact support via dashboard chat or email support@proxyrack.com to request a refund.
conditions: contact via dashboard chat or email

kyc.what_triggers_kyc: ID requested for account verification. BlackhatWorld reports: identity mishandling concerns. USE WITH CAUTION for KYC.

support.response_time: Varies — some reports of slow response

notes: KYC FLAG: ID verification requested. BlackHatWorld reports account suspension issues and identity mishandling. Trustpilot 4.5 but with serious negative reviews about suspensions. USE WITH CAUTION. Founded 2014, 2M+ IPs, 140+ countries. Thread-based pricing.
